since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.91%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.09% · Gold -0.10% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.91%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.91%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.99%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +3.09%, BIDU +2.80%, GOOGL +2.11%, WDAY +1.81%, NOW +1.69%. Laggards: SKHY -5.99%, ARM -4.12%, TSM -3.57%, DELL -2.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.18% at $135.52
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
